summary: This bundle records deterministic proof for review-variant status packets and output-under-test text extraction.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: review variants status and prompt rendering
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the CLI reference claims about review variant passed/blocked/failed packet status, machine-readable blocked reason codes, and `--output-text-key` prompt extraction are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: A real external judge provider was invoked
Every possible blocked or failed reason code is enumerated
The extracted narrative text is judged correct by a model
Review variants are sufficient proof for every behavior claim

notableAssertions: passing variant output produces passed review-summary and variant status
blocked variant output produces blocked review-summary status and machine-readable reason codes
failed variant output produces failed review-summary and variant status
executor auth failure is classified as blocked unavailable_executor with partialSuccess when another variant passes
output-under-test mode renders the referenced artifact and extracted JSON text into the review prompt
the rendered prompt includes Output Under Test Text and the realized output span

decision.reason: Focused CLI tests exercise the public review variants and review prompt input paths for passed/blocked/failed status handling, reason-code preservation, unavailable executor classification, and output-text extraction.
